allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost -Q "SELECT local_tcp_port FROM sys.dm_exec_connections WHERE session_id = @@SPID" -E)

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -Wait -ArgumentList '-Command', 'Set-ItemProperty -Path \\"HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.MSSQLSERVER\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp\\" -Name \\"Enabled\\" -Value 1; Set-ItemProperty -Path \\"HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.MSSQLSERVER\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp\\IPAll\\" -Name \\"TcpPort\\" -Value \\"1433\\"; Set-ItemProperty -Path \\"HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.MSSQLSERVER\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp\\IPAll\\" -Name \\"TcpDynamicPorts\\" -Value \\"\\"; Restart-Service MSSQLSERVER -Force'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.MSSQLSERVER\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp' -Name 'Enabled' -Value 1; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.MSSQLSERVER\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp\\IPAll' -Name 'TcpPort' -Value '1433'; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.MSSQLSERVER\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp\\IPAll' -Name 'TcpDynamicPorts' -Value ''; Restart-Service MSSQLSERVER -Force")
